title: 🕳️ Escape-Time Algorithms
name: Escape-Time Algorithms
what_it_is: Used to render fractals like the Mandelbrot set—each pixel's color is based on how fast it “escapes” to infinity during iteration.
how_to_use: terrain built from escape-time logic—colors bloom based on divergence
her dress glows brighter where values escape fast—like chaotic tide maps
animation_behavior: Color flickers based on input or location, zoom reveals layers of escape patterns ---
